description: Cogedim is a French real estate developer focused on new-build residential properties and related homebuying and property-investment information. Its website presents property listings, financing tools, and buyer/investor guidance across France.
summary: Cogedim exposes a public MCP server at `https://www.cogedim.com/mcp`; no other public developer APIs, GraphQL endpoints, or CLIs were found on `cogedim.com`.
